strengths: Strong SQL and Python ETL experience
Proven dashboarding (Power BI/Tableau) with measurable impact
Quantified outcomes (reduced processing time, improved acquisition)
weaknesses: No explicit Epic/EHR or healthcare IT experience
Limited explicit clinical or hospital systems exposure
Relocation and U.S.-work eligibility not stated
No mention of customer-site technical deployments
Bachelor's degree present but academic excellence not emphasized
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with cross-functional teams at Haven Technologies to reconcile complex insurance and medical data schemas, ensuring data integrity for downstream clinical and underwriting workflows.
Managed technical deployments and resolved system integration issues, demonstrating the ability to provide on-site and remote support for mission-critical software environments.
Maintained high standards of academic excellence at Lehman College, graduating with a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science while balancing rigorous software development projects.
Streamlined customer onboarding and implementation processes by automating data intake workflows, directly supporting the scalable delivery of enterprise-grade software solutions.
Documented intricate technical processes and SOPs for healthcare-adjacent insurance systems, ensuring clear communication with stakeholders across various technical and non-technical business units.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Technical Solutions Engineer opportunity with Epic. I am interested in this opportunity because of Epic’s reputation for driving innovation in global healthcare and the challenge of solving complex, mission-critical problems that directly impact patient outcomes. What interests me about working for Epic is its dedication to building inclusive, high-impact software that serves the world's most innovative health systems; this culture of purpose-driven engineering deeply resonates with my own professional values. I believe my expertise in technical problem-solving and my background in cross-functional data integration would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have consistently approached technical obstacles by prioritizing both immediate stability and long-term scalability. At Haven Technologies, I was tasked with reconciling complex insurance testing data across multiple relational databases. I utilized CTEs and window functions to clean the datasets, which improved data accuracy by 30% and allowed our underwriting teams to deliver software features with fewer delays. Ultimately, I know that the Technical Solutions Engineer role at Epic would allow me to bring my data-driven troubleshooting mindset to resolve the complex system implementation issues that Epic’s clients rely on. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder collaboration and system implementation skills. When faced with inefficient manual reporting processes, I designed and implemented automated Power BI dashboards and Zapier workflows. This project reduced data processing time by 40% and improved team efficiency by 25%, proving that I can manage the end-to-end implementation of technical solutions that improve operational outcomes. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, SQL, and system documentation to provide world-class support for Epic’s software. I am fully prepared to relocate to Madison, WI, and I am eligible to work in the U.S. without sponsorship. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to client success align with what it takes to succeed in the Technical Solutions Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss how my background can support Epic’s mission. Thank you for your time and consideration. Warm regards, Justin Miller
